Name: Intent Pattern Taxonomy
Description: Root node

Name: Purchase Intent
Description: User is trying to buy a product

Name: Consumer Goods Purchase
Description: User is trying to buy consumer products

Name: Everyday Item Purchase
Description: User is trying to buy lower-consideration goods

Name: Durable Goods Purchase
Description: User is trying to buy higher-consideration goods

Name: High Consideration Purchase
Description: User is evaluating a major purchase

Name: Researching Major Purchase
Description: User is researching before selecting a major item

Name: Ready to Buy Major Item
Description: User appears close to purchase

Name: Lead Generation Intent
Description: User is showing lead-oriented action intent

Name: Contact and Consultation
Description: User is looking to initiate contact or consultation

Name: Consultation Request
Description: User is seeking consultation

Name: Contact Request
Description: User is trying to contact a provider

Name: Application and Submission
Description: User is preparing to submit details

Name: Form Submission
Description: User is likely to fill or submit a form

Name: Application Submission
Description: User is likely to apply or submit an application

Name: Sales Engagement
Description: User is engaging in sales-oriented actions

Name: Demo Request
Description: User is likely to request a demo

Name: Call Request
Description: User is likely to request a call

Name: Booking and Reservation Intent
Description: User is trying to reserve or book

Name: Travel and Stay Booking
Description: User is trying to book travel or lodging

Name: Flight Booking
Description: User is likely to book flights

Name: Hotel Booking
Description: User is likely to book lodging

Name: Appointment and Visit Booking
Description: User is trying to reserve time or access

Name: Appointment Booking
Description: User is likely to book an appointment

Name: Restaurant Reservation
Description: User is likely to reserve a restaurant

Name: Event and Ticket Booking
Description: User is trying to attend or reserve an event

Name: Ticket Purchase
Description: User is likely to buy tickets

Name: Event Reservation
Description: User is likely to reserve an event

Name: Subscription Intent
Description: User is evaluating or ready to subscribe

Name: Media and Content Subscription
Description: User is evaluating content subscriptions

Name: Streaming Subscription Research
Description: User is researching streaming subscriptions

Name: Ready to Subscribe Media Service
Description: User is close to subscribing

Name: Product and Membership Subscription
Description: User is evaluating recurring products or memberships

Name: Recurring Delivery Interest
Description: User is interested in recurring delivery

Name: Membership Enrollment
Description: User is close to enrolling in a membership

Name: Quote and Estimate Intent
Description: User is trying to understand or request pricing

Name: Price Discovery
Description: User is checking likely cost

Name: Checking Price Range
Description: User is checking general pricing

Name: Requesting Custom Estimate
Description: User is seeking a tailored estimate

Name: Financial Quote
Description: User is seeking regulated or financial quotes

Name: Insurance Quote
Description: User is seeking insurance pricing

Name: Loan or Financing Quote
Description: User is seeking financing terms

Name: Comparison Intent
Description: User is comparing options before deciding

Name: Product Comparison
Description: User is comparing products

Name: Brand Comparison
Description: User is comparing brands

Name: Feature Comparison
Description: User is comparing capabilities or features

Name: Provider Comparison
Description: User is comparing providers or sellers

Name: Service Provider Comparison
Description: User is comparing service providers

Name: Price and Value Comparison
Description: User is comparing cost relative to value

Name: Review and Validation Intent
Description: User is validating choices through reviews or social proof

Name: Expert Review Consumption
Description: User is consuming expert review material

Name: Reading Editorial Reviews
Description: User is reading expert reviews

Name: Watching Product Review Content
Description: User is watching reviews

Name: Social Proof and Validation
Description: User is relying on other users for validation

Name: Reading Customer Ratings
Description: User is checking ratings

Name: Checking Reputation Signals
Description: User is validating trust or reputation

Name: Research and Learning Intent
Description: User is researching, learning, or defining a need

Name: Topic Learning
Description: User is learning about a topic

Name: Introductory Learning
Description: User is at an early learning stage

Name: Deep Research Learning
Description: User is deeply researching a topic

Name: Specification and Requirement Research
Description: User is studying specs, requirements, or fit

Name: Understanding Product Specs
Description: User is trying to understand specifications

Name: Checking Compatibility
Description: User is checking technical or practical fit

Name: Problem Definition
Description: User is defining the need or solution space

Name: Looking for Solution Types
Description: User is exploring solution categories

Name: Defining Need Clearly
Description: User is narrowing their need

Name: Planning Intent
Description: User is planning timing, budget, or logistics

Name: Purchase Planning
Description: User is planning a future purchase

Name: Budgeting for Purchase
Description: User is planning budget

Name: Timeline Planning
Description: User is planning when to act

Name: Activity Planning
Description: User is planning a trip, event, or life activity

Name: Trip Planning
Description: User is planning travel or outing

Name: Household Planning
Description: User is planning household-related activity

Name: Local Visit Intent
Description: User is likely to visit a local place

Name: Nearby Place Discovery
Description: User is searching for nearby options

Name: Finding Places Nearby
Description: User is explicitly finding nearby places

Name: Checking Local Options
Description: User is evaluating local options

Name: Visit Preparation
Description: User is preparing for a local visit

Name: Checking Hours and Access
Description: User is checking readiness to visit

Name: Preparing Local Visit
Description: User is preparing details for a visit

Name: Retention and Renewal Intent
Description: User is deciding whether to continue, renew, or switch

Name: Renewal Evaluation
Description: User is considering continuation options

Name: Considering Renewal
Description: User is assessing whether to renew

Name: Comparing Renew Versus Switch
Description: User is deciding whether to stay or switch

Name: Account Continuation Action
Description: User is close to renewal or cancellation

Name: Renewing or Upgrading
Description: User is likely to upgrade or renew

Name: Cancelling or Downgrading
Description: User is likely to reduce or cancel

Name: Service and Support Intent
Description: User is trying to get help or resolution

Name: Help Seeking
Description: User is searching for support resources

Name: Contacting Support
Description: User is trying to reach support

Name: Finding Help Resources
Description: User is looking for self-service help

Name: Resolution Action
Description: User is trying to resolve a problem

Name: Return or Refund
Description: User is seeking return or refund

Name: Claim Complaint or Issue Resolution
Description: User is addressing a complaint or issue

Name: Post Purchase Usage Intent
Description: User likely already owns or uses the product or service

Name: Setup and Usage
Description: User is setting up or learning to use

Name: Setup and Configuration
Description: User is setting up a product or service

Name: Learning How to Use
Description: User is learning how to use

Name: Ownership Optimization
Description: User is optimizing value after purchase

Name: Maintenance and Care
Description: User is maintaining the product or service

Name: Maximizing Value from Purchase
Description: User is trying to get more value post-purchase

Name: Passive or Ambiguous Intent
Description: Intent is weak, passive, or unclear

Name: Passive Consumption
Description: User is consuming content without clear action intent

Name: General Browsing
Description: Content indicates broad browsing only

Name: Entertainment Only Consumption
Description: Content suggests low-action entertainment use

Name: Ambiguous Intent
Description: Multiple or unclear intent possibilities

Name: Multiple Plausible Intents
Description: Several intents appear equally likely

Name: No Clear Action Signal
Description: No actionable signal is present
